name: message-of-the-day
description: A local Codex plugin that provides a concise message of the day.

interface.shortDescription: Get a concise daily note in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Message of the Day adds a small local Codex skill that responds with a fresh daily message, including a theme and practical nudge.
defaultPrompt: Give me the message of the day.
What should I keep in mind today?
Start my day with a short note.
